# example.com - Extended AI Crawl Guide

## Purpose

- Describe the structure of a site initialized from Editorial Starter.
- Highlight the default homepage sections, content rails, and optional commerce areas.

## Key URLs

- Home: https://example.com/
- Posts index: https://example.com/blog/
- Newsletter anchor: https://example.com/#newsletter-signup
- Featured story placeholder: https://example.com/featured-story/
- Feed: https://example.com/feed/
- Category archive root: https://example.com/category/
- Tag archive root: https://example.com/tag/

## Content Notes

- The homepage usually contains a hero, featured stories grid, newsletter signup, optional campaign spotlight, and latest posts grid.
- Shopify support is optional and only active when the Shopify pattern or storefront markup is used.
- Structured data defaults to WebSite, Organization, Article, and BreadcrumbList.

## Refresh Guidance

- Replace this file during theme initialization so URLs match the deployed site.
- Keep newsletter, featured-story, and archive URLs aligned with the real information architecture.
